name: Steppy 1U
description: Four-track 64-step gate sequencer with external clocking, per-track length, gate length, clock division, swing, delay, probability, ratchets, loopy performance looping, and preset memory.

controls.name: MULTIFUNCTION Buttons
controls.description: Set gates in Play mode and act as track, page, mute, and parameter buttons in Select and Edit modes.
controls.detail: 16 step buttons · 4 track buttons · 4 page buttons

controls.name: SELECT button
controls.description: Enables Select mode for track, page, mute, page-follow, loopy, clear, and reset operations.

controls.name: EDIT button
controls.description: Enables Edit mode and Step Edit mode for track-wide and per-step parameter editing.
controls.detail: short press = Edit · long press = Step Edit

controls.name: SAVE / RST button
controls.description: Saves and recalls presets in Edit mode and toggles RUN / RESET boot behavior when held during power-up.
controls.detail: save preset · hold on boot = RUN/RESET mode

controls.name: LOAD button
controls.description: Loads, clears, or selects a preset slot from the eight internal memories.

inputs.name: CLK IN
inputs.description: External clock or trigger input. Steppy advances one step on each pulse.

inputs.name: RST IN
inputs.description: Reset or run gate input. In RESET mode it returns all tracks to step 1; in RUN mode it also gates playback.

behaviors.name: Four independent tracks
behaviors.trigger: patch a clock to CLK IN
behaviors.description: Steppy plays four simultaneous gate tracks, each with its own pattern length, mute state, clock division, swing, delay, and probability.

behaviors.name: Per-step editing
behaviors.description: Step Edit mode adds ratchets, per-step gate length, per-step delay, and per-step probability on top of the track-wide settings.

behaviors.name: Loopy performance mode
behaviors.description: Holding one or two steps in Play mode can loop a short slice of the pattern for fills, stutters, and live improvisation.

behaviors.name: Page follow
behaviors.trigger: enable Page Follow in Select mode
behaviors.description: Long patterns can auto-follow the current play position across the four 16-step pages.

behaviors.name: Run / reset boot mode
behaviors.description: Steppy can boot in either RESET mode or RUN mode, so the reset jack can either only reset or also act as a remote transport gate.

behaviors.name: Preset memory
behaviors.trigger: use SAVE or LOAD in Edit mode
behaviors.description: Eight preset slots store all four tracks and their performance parameters.

patchIdeas.name: Four-part drum grid
patchIdeas.patch: Clock into CLK IN · Track A triggers kick · Track B triggers snare · Track C triggers hat · Track D triggers percussion · each track can run its own length for layered polyrhythms.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Steppy 1U:
* Track A: 16 steps
* Track B: 12 steps
* Track C: 8 steps
* Track D: 5 steps

Clock:
Kick:
Snare:
Hat:
Perc:

- Clock (Out) c> Steppy 1U (CLK IN)
- Steppy 1U (OUT A) t> Kick (Trig)
- Steppy 1U (OUT B) t> Snare (Trig)
- Steppy 1U (OUT C) t> Hat (Trig)
- Steppy 1U (OUT D) t> Perc (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Polyrhythm layers
patchIdeas.patch: Different clock divisions and pattern lengths turn one master pulse into four gate streams that realign only on the downbeat, making a compact polyrhythmic engine.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Steppy 1U:
* Track A: length 16
* Track B: length 15
* Track C: length 13
* Track D: length 11

Clock:
Envelope:
VCA:
Output:

- Clock (Out) c> Steppy 1U (CLK IN)
- Steppy 1U (OUT A) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Steppy 1U (OUT B) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Steppy 1U (OUT C) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Steppy 1U (OUT D) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Loopy fill
patchIdeas.patch: A larger pattern runs underneath while Loopy brackets a short cluster of active steps and repeats it for a fill, then the track resumes its full cycle.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Steppy 1U:
* Track A: 32 steps
* Loopy: on

Clock:
Drum:
Output:

- Clock (Out) c> Steppy 1U (CLK IN)
- Steppy 1U (OUT A) t> Drum (Trig)
- Drum (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Bar reset transport
patchIdeas.patch: RST IN clears all four tracks to step 1 on the bar line, keeping patterns aligned even when they have different lengths or when the clock is stopped and restarted.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Steppy 1U:
* RUN / RESET: RESET mode
* Track A: 16 steps
* Track B: 10 steps

Clock:
Reset Pulse:
Kick:
Snare:

- Clock (Out) c> Steppy 1U (CLK IN)
- Reset Pulse (Gate) g> Steppy 1U (RST IN)
- Steppy 1U (OUT A) t> Kick (Trig)
- Steppy 1U (OUT B) t> Snare (Trig)
